serverless.function.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

serverless.function.title: Serverless function runtime versions are current
serverless.function.rationale: Current runtime versions include security patches and features.

paas.app.title: Platform hardening is enabled for PaaS services
paas.app.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

paas.app.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

serverless.function.title: Concurrency limits are enforced

serverless.function.title: Cost controls are enabled for serverless resources
serverless.function.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

serverless.function.title: Audit secret access by functions
serverless.function.rationale: Secret access by serverless functions must be audited and logged.

serverless.function.title: Apply least privilege to secret access
serverless.function.rationale: Functions must have minimal required permissions for secret access.

serverless.function.title: Eliminate plaintext secrets in serverless configs
serverless.function.rationale: Serverless functions must not contain plaintext secrets in environment variables.

serverless.function.title: Rotate secrets used by functions
serverless.function.rationale: Secrets used by serverless functions must be rotated regularly.

serverless.function.title: Use managed secret references
serverless.function.rationale: Serverless functions must reference secrets from managed secret stores.

serverless.function.title: Environment variables are encrypted in serverless functions
serverless.function.rationale: Encrypting environment variables protects sensitive data.

storage.bucket.rationale: Restricting bucket public access prevents unauthorized data exposure.

storage.volume.title: Persistent volumes are encrypted
storage.volume.rationale: Volume encryption protects persistent data from unauthorized access.

streaming.encryption.title: Streaming data encryption is enabled
streaming.encryption.rationale: Stream encryption protects data in transit for streaming applications.

streaming.monitoring.title: Streaming data monitoring and alerting is enabled
streaming.monitoring.rationale: Stream monitoring enables real-time detection of anomalies and security threats.
